Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx

Class OfxV2Writer.InvestmentPosition

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxV2Writer.InvestmentPosition
Enclosing class:
OfxV2Writer
public static class OfxV2Writer.InvestmentPosition extends Object
Describes a single investment holding, such as a stock or mutual fund position.

  • Field Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    BigDecimal
    costBasis
    Cost basis for the holding.
    String
    heldInAccount
    Indicates which sub-account the position is held in.

    Market value of the position.
    String

    Optional memo for the position.
    String
    positionType
    The OFX position element to use (e.g., POSSTOCK).
    String
    positionTypeIndicator
    Position side such as LONG or SHORT.
    String
    priceAsOf
    Price as-of date for the security.
    OfxV2Writer.SecurityData
    security
    Security information for the position.
    BigDecimal
    unitPrice
    Price per unit.
    BigDecimal
    units
    Units currently held.
